MORGANBERSERKER-ADVERSITYS_FURY.descript: #Deal !D! damage, +!Bonus! if your HP is at 75% or less, and +!Bonus! more at 50% or less.
MORGANBERSERKER-ROYAL_EXECUTION.title: Royal Execution
MORGANBERSERKER-ROYAL_EXECUTION.descript: #Deal !D! damage. If this kills the target: gain !NpCharge! *NP *Charge and apply !Curse! *Curse to ALL enemies.

MORGANBERSERKER-WINTER_THORNS.title: Winter Thorns
MORGANBERSERKER-WINTER_THORNS.descriptio: #Gain !B! Block. Enemies that attack you this turn gain !Thorns! *Curse.

MORGANBERSERKER-SAVIORS_TEARS.descriptio: #Heal !H! HP. If your HP is at 50% or less: heal !BigHeal! instead.
MORGANBERSERKER-CALL_OF_THE_FAIRY_KNIGHT: #Barghest applies !Curse! *Curse to ALL enemies. Baobhan Sith applies !Weak! *Weak to ALL enemies. Melusine grants !B! Block.
MORGANBERSERKER-FAIRY_OF_THE_RAINLAND.de: #Gain !NpCharge! *NP *Charge. At the start of each turn: gain !Stacks! *NP *Charge.
MORGANBERSERKER-MADNESS_ENHANCEMENT.desc: #Whenever you lose HP during your turn: gain !Stacks! *NP *Charge (up to 2 times per turn).
MORGANBERSERKER-FAIRY_EYES.title: Fairy Eyes
MORGANBERSERKER-FAIRY_EYES.description: #At the start of each turn: apply !Stacks! *Curse to ALL enemies.
MORGANBERSERKER-TERRITORY_CREATION.title: Territory Creation
MORGANBERSERKER-TERRITORY_CREATION.descr: #At the end of your turn: gain !Stacks! Block.

MORGANBERSERKER-WINTER_COURT.title: Winter Court
MORGANBERSERKER-ROADLESS_CAMELOT.title: ROADLESS CAMELOT
MORGANBERSERKER-ROADLESS_CAMELOT.descrip: #NP: consumes ALL your Charge (min !ChargeCost!). Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies, +!PerTen! per 10 Charge beyond the minimum. Apply !Curse! *Curse to ALL enemies. Gain *Blessing *of *Rhongomyniad.
MORGANBERSERKER-MEMORY_OF_LONDINIUM.desc: #NP: consumes ALL your Charge (min !ChargeCost!). Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies, +!PerTen! per 10 Charge beyond the minimum. Gain 1 *Intangible. Add !C! *Knight's *Arms to your hand, +1 if your Charge reaches 100.
MORGANBERSERKER-RHONGOMYNIAD_RAIN.title: Rhongomyniad Rain
MORGANBERSERKER-RHONGOMYNIAD_RAIN.descri: #NP: consumes ALL your Charge (min !ChargeCost!). Deal !D! damage, +!PerTen! per 10 Charge beyond the minimum.
MORGANBERSERKER-TYRANTS_LANCE.title: Tyrant's Lance
MORGANBERSERKER-SAVIORS_VENGEANCE.title: Savior's Vengeance
MORGANBERSERKER-SAVIORS_VENGEANCE.descri: #Deal !D! damage, plus 1 for every !Divisor! HP you are missing (max !Max! total).
MORGANBERSERKER-FINAL_COLLECTION.title: Final Collection
MORGANBERSERKER-FINAL_COLLECTION.descrip: #Consume ALL the target's *Curse: deal !PerPoint! damage for each point consumed.
MORGANBERSERKER-FROM_THE_WORLDS_END.desc: #Gain *Guts: the first time you would die this combat, survive at 1 HP, gain 3 *Strength and 50 *NP *Charge. Apply !Weak! *Weak to ALL enemies.
MORGANBERSERKER-LAST_RESORT.title: Last Resort
MORGANBERSERKER-LAST_RESORT.description: #Cannot be played before turn !Turn!. Gain !NpCharge! *NP *Charge. Gain *Guts: the first time you would die this combat, survive at 1 HP.
MORGANBERSERKER-WINTER_CORONATION.title: Winter Coronation
MORGANBERSERKER-WINTER_CORONATION.descri: #Enter *Winter *Queen form permanently. Apply !Curse! *Curse to ALL enemies.
MORGANBERSERKER-EXTRAORDINARY_TAX.title: Extraordinary Tax
MORGANBERSERKER-EXTRAORDINARY_TAX.descri: #Apply !Curse! *Curse to ALL enemies. Heal !H! HP for each enemy with *Curse.
MORGANBERSERKER-VIVIANS_GIFT.title: Vivian's Gift
MORGANBERSERKER-HAILSTORM_WALL.title: Hailstorm Wall
MORGANBERSERKER-A_HOME_WITH_MORGAN.title: "A Home with Morgan"
MORGANBERSERKER-A_HOME_WITH_MORGAN.descr: #Raise your Max HP by !MaxHp! and heal !H! HP. Even the Queen of tyranny once dreamed of a home.
MORGANBERSERKER-CHARISMA_OF_ADVERSITY.de: #Your Attacks deal +!Stacks! damage for each threshold of HP you are missing: any, 25%, 50% and 75%.
MORGANBERSERKER-CURSE_OF_CERNUNNOS.title: Curse of Cernunnos
MORGANBERSERKER-CURSE_OF_CERNUNNOS.descr: #Your *Curse no longer decreases after it deals damage.
MORGANBERSERKER-SOVEREIGN_OF_TWO_FACES.d: #Whenever you change form: draw 2 cards and gain 10 *NP *Charge.
MORGANBERSERKER-SPRIGGAN_VIGIL.title: Spriggan's Vigil
MORGANBERSERKER-SPRIGGAN_VIGIL.descripti: #At the start of each turn: gain !Stacks! Block.
MORGANBERSERKER-PERPETUAL_WINTER.title: Perpetual Winter
MORGANBERSERKER-PERPETUAL_WINTER.descrip: #At the start of each turn: apply !Stacks! *Curse to ALL enemies.
MORGANBERSERKER-FAE_BLOOD_PACT.title: Fae Blood Pact
MORGANBERSERKER-FAE_BLOOD_PACT.descripti: #At the start of each turn: lose 2 HP and gain !Stacks! *NP *Charge.
MORGANBERSERKER-ROADLESS_CAMELOT_UNLEASH: #NP (!ChargeCost! Charge): deal !D! damage to ALL enemies, +!PerTen! per 10 Charge beyond the minimum. Apply !Curse! *Curse to ALL enemies. Gain *Blessing *of *Rhongomyniad.
MORGANBERSERKER-MEMORY_OF_LONDINIUM_UNLE: #NP (!ChargeCost! Charge): deal !D! damage to ALL enemies, +!PerTen! per 10 Charge beyond the minimum. Gain 1 *Intangible. Add !C! *Knight's *Arms to your hand, +1 if your Charge reaches 200.
MORGANBERSERKER-KNIGHTS_ARM.title: Knight's Arm
MORGANBERSERKER-KNIGHTS_ARM.description: #Deal !D! damage. Swords of knights past, present and future.
